nws.name: Monday
nws.detailedForecast: A chance of rain showers after 7am. Mostly cloudy, with a high near 49. North wind 9 to 13 mph. Chance of precipitation is 40%.

nws.name: Monday Night
nws.shortForecast: Slight Chance Rain Showers then Chance Rain And Snow Showers
nws.detailedForecast: A slight chance of rain showers before 1am, then a chance of rain and snow showers. Mostly cloudy, with a low around 28. East northeast wind around 12 mph. New snow accumulation of less than half an inch possible.

nws.name: Tuesday
nws.shortForecast: Chance Snow Showers then Chance Rain And Snow
nws.detailedForecast: A chance of snow showers before 7am, then a chance of rain and snow. Mostly cloudy, with a high near 49. East southeast wind 13 to 18 mph, with gusts as high as 26 mph. New snow accumulation of less than half an inch possible.

nws.name: Tuesday Night
nws.detailedForecast: A chance of rain and snow. Mostly cloudy, with a low around 41. South southeast wind 15 to 18 mph, with gusts as high as 30 mph.

nws.name: Wednesday
nws.shortForecast: Chance Light Rain then Slight Chance T-storms
nws.detailedForecast: A chance of rain before 1pm, then a slight chance of thunderstorms and a slight chance of rain. Mostly sunny, with a high near 73. South wind 18 to 24 mph, with gusts as high as 38 mph.

nws.name: Thursday
